Description: Booking appointments, capturing demographics, and receiving confirmations.
As a Parent, I want to book an appointment online by selecting a doctor and time slot.
As a Parent, I want to provide patient demographics (Name, DOB, Symptoms) during booking.
As a Parent, I want to receive an appointment confirmation via SMS/Email.
Parent dashboard to view clinical notes and past medical records.
As a Parent, I want to view clinical notes and prescriptions issued by the doctor after a visit.
Receptionist dashboard for monitoring, confirming, and registering appointments.
As a Receptionist, I want to view the daily appointment pipeline and monitor statuses.
As a Receptionist, I want to manually confirm online bookings.
As a Receptionist, I want to rapidly register an appointment for walk-in patients.
Invoice generation and payment status updates.
As a Receptionist, I want to view generated invoices post-consultation.
As a Receptionist, I want to update the payment status using a 1-Click Paid action.
Real-time queue, patient medical history, and clinical consultation tools.
As a Doctor, I want to view the real-time queue of waiting patients.
As a Doctor, I want to securely access patient medical history.
As a Doctor, I want to record detailed notes during clinical consultations.
As a Doctor, I want to immediately issue electronic prescriptions utilizing autocomplete.
As a Doctor, I want to update master records and demographic information.
Integrate Twilio SMS API for appointment confirmations.
Setup SMTP for email notifications.
Design the core 5 entities (Patient, Appointment, Visit, Prescription, Billing) in MySQL.
Build responsive Web UI for clinic staff and Parents.
System login, OTP, and Role-based access control.
As a Parent, I want to login using my phone number (OTP) to access my portal.
As a Clinic Staff, I want to login securely and see functionalities based on my role.
Manage doctors schedule, services, and pricing config.
As an Admin, I want to configure doctor schedules and time slots for online booking.
As an Admin, I want to configure the catalog of services and their prices.
Design Figma interactive prototype for all web portals.
Setup GitHub Actions and Deployment pipelines.
Conduct User Acceptance Testing before final launch.
